## Summary

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Related issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Security improvement
- [ ] Accessibility improvement
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Other

## Testing

Explain how the change was tested.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots or recordings for interface changes.

## Review checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and documented.
- [ ] I have not committed secrets or private user data.
- [ ] I considered mobile and low-bandwidth use.
- [ ] I considered accessibility.
- [ ] I considered security, privacy, and authorization.
- [ ] I considered moderation and abuse risks.
- [ ] AI-related changes follow `docs/RESPONSIBLE_AI.md`.
- [ ] Tests or verification steps are included where appropriate.
